sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64491" key="mazhro\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαζηρὸς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πίναξ</foreign>, trencher <sense id="n64491.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for barley-cakes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.84</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
